name: ZIP File Operations via Printer Migration CLITool
description: Detects suspicious execution of `printbrm.exe` (Printer Migration Wizard Command Line Tool) when it is used to create or extract `.zip` files. Adversaries may leverage this legitimate Windows utility to stage data for exfiltration, transfer tools onto a system (ingress), or hide artifacts, thereby achieving defense evasion by using a trusted binary.

prompts.prompt: Suspicious `printbrm.exe` activity involving ZIP file operations has been detected. Event Details: **Image** {Image}, **Command Line** {CommandLine}, **Parent Image** {ParentImage}, **User** {User}, **Computer Name** {ComputerName}, **Event ID** {EventID}, **Original File Name** {OriginalFileName}, **Rule Name** {RuleName}. Investigate whether this is a legitimate printer migration/backup/restore operation or a malicious attempt to stage data, transfer tools, or hide artifacts.

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line used for the printbrm.exe execution.

parameters.name: ParentImage
parameters.description: The parent process that launched printbrm.exe.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account under which the process ran.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Sysmon event ID for process creation (should be 1).

parameters.name: OriginalFileName
parameters.description: The original file name of the executable (if captured by Sysmon).

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.description: Sysmon specific field for rule matching.
